channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Over flowing bin, 16th May
item.description:
This bin has been over flowing for 3 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Park Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th May
item.description:
Offence carried out between late afternoon on 15th May and very early 16th May.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are wires exposed in the shelter. Black electrical control box cover hanging off in bus shelter exposing electrical wires., 16th May
item.description:
Black electrical control box cover hanging off in bus shelter exposing electrical wires.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - wires exposed on bus shelter

item.title: O/s 94 Brondesbury villas by tree, 16th May
item.description:
Loads of black bags by tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: O/s 94 Brondesbury villas by wall on pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Bathroom wire rack. Carpet. Trolley on pavement by wall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dead cat in a bay, 16th May
item.description:
Not sure what happened but saw the cat in one of the car bays so I wanted to report.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old bed and other bits on corner of Piedmont and Congo, 16th May
item.description:
Bed been there a few weeks, doesn’t belong to neighbours so think it’s been dumped. Other bits of rubbish appearing on / around it now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Piedmont Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffti on street sign, 16th May
item.description:
There is both graffti and a sticker on street signage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Needleman Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many street lights not working on Path 39, 16th May
item.description:
The lighting along path 39 beside train line has numerous lights not working. It is very dark and very unsafe for anybody walking along the path. The path is uneven and it is a very possible trip hazard for anybody walking along being unable to see the hazards.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light in park or open space

item.title: O/s 101 Brondesbury Villas by wall, 16th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Multiple pot holes various sizes, 16th May
item.description:
Multiple pot holes of various sizes, getting worse has been here for a long time, from front lane to hall lane and continuously getting worse. I’m worried about damage to my car and others as drivers have to swerve in the road in an attempt to avoid them only to end up in another pot hole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Arterial Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tpping, 16th May
item.description:
Dumped clothes and rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch, 16th May
item.description:
Fallen branch placed on pavement. Been there for a few days since thunderstorm so probably came off of a tree in the cemetery and landed in road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad parking / on the kerb, 16th May
item.description:
This BMW has been parked very badly outside my house for several days now. It is parked outside the parking bay, which is obstructing access for an 80-year-old lady. Please look into this as soon as possible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter Rudloe Road, 16th May
item.description:
There’s a large amount of litter on Rudloe Road at the junction with Poynders Road including a gas canister that has been there for weeks. Given that our roads are supposedly litter picked at least once a week this proves that this isn’t happening.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rudloe Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wardrobe pieces and boxes left against the wall on the path, 16th May
item.description:
Wardrobe is pieces and large box with polystyrene has been left on the path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes on Tabard Street, 16th May
item.description:
There are two Lime bikes on the pavement. It has been there one day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the red route on Tower Bridge Road, 16th May
item.description:
Bike has been left in the road and need removing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Bridge, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in road, 16th May
item.description:
There’s a dead fox in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Kenmere Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste overflowing on Potier Street, 16th May
item.description:
There is a Dog Waste bin which needs emptying. It was reported a week ago and despite fixmystreet stating it had been fix/emptied it is still full and overflowing. Please can it be cleaned up and emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Potier Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
